hero.title: Unlock Wealth Digital
hero.description: Crafting peaceful, powerful, and high-converting digital spaces for introverted entrepreneurs and soulful brands.   Unlock your digital home—a sanctuary designed to nurture both your professional success and inner growth.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.description_1: "In a world of noise and uncertainty, your digital presence should be your sanctuary. We believe that your career and business are extensions of your inner peace."
welcome.description_2: Unlock Wealth Resort Academy was established to strike a perfect balance between professional success and mental wellness.                       Now, as the tech branch of our academy, Unlock Wealth Digital goes beyond creating world-class websites. We build intentional digital spaces that safeguard your energy and showcase your true capabilities."
welcome.mission_text: "To empower individuals by building high-quality digital identities that harmonize professional success with mental well-being."
welcome.vision_text: "A world where every visionary has a serene digital home to thrive, regardless of the chaos in the physical world."

residency.title: Start Your Journey: International Digital Residency
residency.availability: Only 2 slots available this month to ensure quality care.

reviews_list.quote: "Starting my portfolio felt like a mountain, but the Resort made it feel like a walk in the park. I finally have a digital home I'm proud of."
reviews_list.name: Wendy S.

reviews_list.quote: "As an introvert, I struggled to show my work. Now, my website does the talking for me. The mental support guides were a huge bonus!"
reviews_list.name: Hailey C.

reviews_list.quote: "Professional, calm, and affordable. The $100 package is exactly what SMEs in our region need right now."
reviews_list.name: Thomas L.

faqs_list.question: What exactly is included in the Residency?
faqs_list.answer: You get a professional website (UI/UX optimized), a custom .com domain with hosting for 1 year, and our exclusive mental wellness guides to help you stay focused.

faqs_list.question: I'm an introvert: do I need to attend many meetings?
faqs_list.answer: Not at all! We use a simple text-based discovery form. We value your energy and keep the process quiet and efficient.

faqs_list.question: Is there any hidden cost?
faqs_list.answer: No hidden fees. The Special rate covers everything for the first year. We want to make high-quality digital presence accessible for everyone.

service_hero.title: Elevate Your Digital Presence
service_hero.description: Ready to transform your brand into a digital masterpiece? We craft bespoke websites and web applications tailored to your unique energy, industry, and audience. Whether you are a creative visionary, a local business, or a holistic guide, we have the perfect digital solution for you.

points.label: Domain & Hosting
points.text: Fully covered for your first year.

points.label: Complete Design & Portfolio
points.text: Advanced UI/UX tailored to your app's needs.

points.label: FengShui Business Naming
points.text: Start your venture with the right energy.

items.title: The Interactive "Bento-Box" Portfolio
items.target: Digital creatives, product designers, and developers.
items.experience: A sleek, modular, and dynamic grid that makes your case studies pop. Show your digital mastery instantly.

items.title: The Frictionless SME "Digital Storefront"
items.target: Hyper-local SMEs (specialty coffee roasters, boutique hospitality, service agencies).
items.experience: A smooth, zero-friction user journey designed to convert local traffic into loyal, paying customers.

items.title: The Scrollytelling Wellness Academy
items.target: Mentors, holistic wealth coaches, and digital retreat platforms.
items.experience: Immersive, story-driven navigation that guides clients through a calming journey of healing, learning, and growth.

items.title: The Infinite Horizontal Visual Exhibition
items.target: Photographers, visual artists, and creative competition entrants.
items.experience: A cinematic, side-scrolling gallery that gives your visual art the prestigious, museum-quality exhibition it deserves.

items.title: The Atmospheric "Energy Check-In" Portal
items.target: Esoteric consultants (Tarot, Astrology, Feng Shui, Reiki).
items.experience: Deeply mystical, visually atmospheric designs that instantly connect with your clients' spiritual needs before they even book a session.

contacthero.title: Get In Touch
contacthero.description: Ready to build your digital sanctuary? Let's start a conversation about your vision.

footer.intro_text: I'm Helen Thant, a UI/UX Designer and fellow introvert. Blending my hospitality background with digital design, I'm here to help you build a peaceful, powerful digital sanctuary. Let's create a space that speaks for you, without the noise.
